evals.name: simple-password-reset
evals.prompt: 로그인 페이지에 '비밀번호 찾기' 링크 추가해줘. 클릭하면 이메일 입력 폼이 나오고, 이메일로 리셋 링크 보내는 기능이야.
evals.expected_output: 1-2개의 todo 파일. 체크리스트 항목이 구체적이고 파일 경로가 포함되어야 함.

baseline.name: appropriate-file-count
baseline.description: Creates 1-2 todo files (not over-split for a simple feature)

baseline.name: checklist-has-file-paths
baseline.description: Checklist items reference specific file paths or component names

baseline.name: correct-markdown-format
baseline.description: Each file has: H1 title, context paragraph, and checklist with '- [ ]' items

baseline.name: checklist-items-are-concrete
baseline.description: Each checklist item describes a specific implementable action, not vague directives

discriminating.name: includes-test-specifications
discriminating.description: At least one todo includes explicit test file paths and describes 2+ specific test scenarios (e.g., 'validateResetToken returns null for expired token')

discriminating.name: documents-design-assumptions
discriminating.description: Context paragraphs state architectural assumptions explicitly (e.g., 'Assuming Prisma ORM', 'prevents email enumeration by always returning 200')

evals.name: medium-profile-page
evals.prompt: 사용자 프로필 페이지를 만들어줘. 프로필 사진 업로드, 닉네임 변경, 비밀번호 변경 기능이 필요해. 백엔드 API도 같이.
evals.expected_output: 3+ todo 파일로 분리 (data layer, API, UI 각각). 번호 prefix로 순서 지정. 각 todo에 충분한 컨텍스트.

baseline.name: concern-based-split
baseline.description: Todos are split by logical concern (e.g., backend vs frontend, or by feature domain), not arbitrarily

baseline.name: dependency-ordering
baseline.description: Files use numbered prefixes that reflect execution order when dependencies exist

baseline.name: context-paragraph-present
baseline.description: Each todo has a context paragraph explaining WHY and HOW it fits the bigger picture

baseline.name: checklist-items-are-concrete
baseline.description: Each checklist item describes a specific implementable action with enough detail for a worker agent

discriminating.name: separates-data-layer
discriminating.description: Database schema/model changes are in a dedicated todo, separate from API route implementation

discriminating.name: includes-test-specifications
discriminating.description: At least one todo includes explicit test file paths with full paths (e.g., 'src/lib/__tests__/profile-api.test.ts') — not just framework names like 'vitest' or 'jest' — and describes 2+ specific named test scenarios (e.g., 'rejects upload exceeding 5MB limit', 'returns 401 for unauthenticated password change')

discriminating.name: documents-design-assumptions
discriminating.description: Context paragraphs state architectural assumptions (e.g., 'file uploads stored locally, no external storage assumed')

discriminating.name: specifies-component-props
discriminating.description: UI todo specifies component prop interfaces (e.g., 'AvatarUpload accepts currentAvatarUrl: string | null, onSuccess: (newUrl: string) => void')

evals.name: large-chat-system
evals.prompt: 우리 앱에 실시간 채팅 시스템 추가해줘. 1:1 채팅이랑 그룹 채팅 둘 다 필요하고, 읽음 표시도 있으면 좋겠어. WebSocket 쓸지 SSE 쓸지는 알아서 결정해줘.
evals.expected_output: 5+ todo 파일로 분리. 아키텍처 결정 사항이 todo 컨텍스트에 반영. client state가 UI와 분리.

baseline.name: tech-decision-documented
baseline.description: The WebSocket vs SSE decision is explicitly documented in the todo context with reasoning

baseline.name: concern-based-decomposition
baseline.description: Feature is decomposed by concern (data model, real-time infra, API, UI) not artificially size-limited

baseline.name: allows-large-cohesive-todos
baseline.description: Tightly coupled items are kept in the same todo rather than over-split (leveraging handoff)

baseline.name: checklist-items-are-concrete
baseline.description: Each checklist item describes a specific implementable action, not vague directives

discriminating.name: separates-state-from-ui
discriminating.description: Client-side state management (stores, hooks, WS connection) is in a dedicated todo, separate from UI component rendering

discriminating.name: includes-test-specifications
discriminating.description: At least one todo includes explicit test file paths with full paths (e.g., 'src/lib/__tests__/chat.test.ts', 'src/__tests__/ws-connection.test.ts') — not just framework names like 'vitest' or 'jest' — and describes 2+ specific named test scenarios (e.g., 'reconnects automatically after server disconnect', 'marks messages as read only for active chat room')

discriminating.name: documents-design-assumptions
discriminating.description: Context paragraphs state architectural assumptions (e.g., read-tracking strategy, reconnection policy)

discriminating.name: specifies-type-definitions
discriminating.description: Includes explicit TypeScript type/interface definitions or references (e.g., WsServerEvent discriminated union, Zod schemas)

evals.name: trivial-typo-fix
evals.prompt: 헤더 컴포넌트에 오타가 있어서 '설정' 이 '설젇' 으로 표시돼. 수정해줘.
evals.expected_output: 정확히 1개의 todo 파일. 제목과 1-3개의 체크리스트 항목만 포함된 최소한의 구성.

baseline.name: single-file-output
baseline.description: Creates exactly 1 todo file — a single typo fix must not be split into multiple todos

baseline.name: correct-markdown-format
baseline.description: The file has an H1 title, an optional brief context sentence, and a checklist with '- [ ]' items

baseline.name: minimal-checklist-items
baseline.description: Contains 1-3 checklist items total — proportional to the trivial scope of fixing a typo

discriminating.name: no-multi-file-split
discriminating.description: Does NOT create multiple todo files (e.g., separate files for 'investigation', 'fix', 'testing') — a typo fix belongs in a single file

discriminating.name: no-brainstorming-artifacts
discriminating.description: Does NOT include brainstorming output, architectural analysis, or design-decision documentation — these are disproportionate for a typo fix

discriminating.name: scope-proportional-to-request
discriminating.description: Does NOT add unrelated scope such as test specifications, type definitions, component refactors, or i18n considerations — the output is strictly scoped to the typo correction
